description: A customer needs to set up port forwarding on their router for a home gaming server.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the router model from the customer's account details.

nodes.task_description: Provide a link to the knowledge base article with step-by-step instructions for port forwarding on that specific router model.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds and provides the correct guide.

nodes.task_description: Explain that the company does not provide direct support for customer-owned devices behind the router.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly sets expectations about the scope of support.
